ORDER GRANTING COMPLEX DESIGNATION AND FOR SINGLE ASSIGNMENT TO JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO FOR ALL PURPOSES. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-05-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 304. JAN-15-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 610 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
